title: Config
description: Root config.yml or any import file for workflow-orchestrator. All top-level keys are optional in individual files; they are merged before validation.

vars.description: Named variables. Use `{{vars.<key>}}` in action prompts for interpolation.

imports.description: Additional YAML files to merge, relative to .workflow/

background.description: When true, may run concurrently with other actions in the same task.

id.description: Unique sub-agent identifier within the agents block. Pattern: `^[a-z][a-z0-9_-]*$`

requires.description: IDs of other sub-agents within the same agents block that must complete first (checked at runtime).

commands.description: Shell command patterns forbidden from running (substring match).

files.description: File path patterns forbidden from editing (glob or /regex/).

Task.description: One task in a workflow. Holds either `actions` or `agents`, never both. A task with neither is a manual task: Claude works from `description`.

actions.description: Actions to run automatically. Mutually exclusive with `agents` (checked at runtime).

agents.description: Sub-agents to run concurrently. Mutually exclusive with `actions` (checked at runtime).

allow_files.description: File path patterns permitted for editing while InProgress (glob or /regex/).

deny.description: Explicit deny rules for files and shell commands.

id.description: Unique task identifier within the workflow. Pattern: `^[a-z][a-z0-9_-]*$`

requires.description: IDs of tasks that must complete before this task starts (checked at runtime).

tasks.description: Tasks to execute. At least one task is required (checked at runtime).
